name: playwright-ai-testing
description: Generic multi-app Playwright + playwright-bdd template: add a new UI/API app under apps/<name>/ with both spec-style and BDD-style coverage from one POM/SOM layer.

scripts.bddgen: bddgen -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --tags "@smoke and not @tracefail and not @triage"
scripts.bddgen:regression: bddgen -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --tags "(@smoke or @regression) and not @tracefail and not @triage"
scripts.test:bdd: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @ui
scripts.test:bdd:regression: npm run bddgen:regression && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:tracefail: npm run bddgen:tracefail && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts; true
scripts.test:bdd:triage: npm run bddgen:triage && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts; true
scripts.debug:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --ui
